_comment: TEMPLATE for the REAL TOTK 1.2.1 address map. Copy to addresses.1.2.1.json and fill in once the console is modded and the record->analyze->confirm loop finds real offsets. Same schema as sim_layout.json so every tool works unchanged when you swap fake data for real memory.

pointer_chains._comment: Raw addresses move every boot (ASLR). Store the stable pointer chain that resolves to the player block. Format: base module + chain of offsets. Filled during Phase 2.
